segments.text: Clashing with spins—there's still mashing potential, more action! Skip one, one more hit!
segments.original_text: はいとスピンぶつかり合って これはねでも暴れはあるまだあるな1回飛ばして1枚

segments.text: That's not necessarily the KO! Ohhhhhhh, he's sealed it! No way—upward!
segments.original_text: うっ撃墜とは限らないああああああああ 仕留めましたいやー上

full_text: Clashing with spins—there's still mashing potential, more action! Skip one, one more hit! That's not necessarily the KO! Ohhhhhhh, he's sealed it! No way—upward!
